arts.ttl: Arsenal eye Chelsea target Mathys Tel but face one stumbling block for Bayern star
arts.sum: The French teenager is keen to secure regular football, which could suit the Gunners and help them to beat rivals Chelsea in the race

arts.ttl: Where will Mathys Tel end up?
arts.sum: As well as Chelsea, Manchester United, Arsenal and Tottenham are all said to be interested in Bayern's Mathys Tel.

arts.ttl: 'Every time': What Harry Kane has said about Mathys Tel as Tottenham and Arsenal offered the striker
arts.sum: Bayern Munich striker Mathys Tel could suddenly become an option for north London rivals Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur in the final days of the January...

arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich defender Jamie Lawrence acknowledges the role of “top coaches” Klose and Demichelis in his growth
arts.sum: In a recent interview, Lawrence spoke of his time in Munich and, specifically, about the two coaches who most shaped his career: “In my opinion, [Miroslav Klose and Martin Demichelis] are two top coaches who have great strengths in the interpersonal area,” Lawrence said, via @iMiaSanMia_GER . “The two of them have given us [Bayern youngsters] perspectives due to their active careers that we probably would never have received in this way.”

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich extends center-back Grayson Dettoni, loans him to Grasshopper Club Zurich
arts.sum: Bayern Munich director of youth development and campus Jochen Sauer was excited to get the deal done on both fronts for Dettoni. Bayern Munich might not be lighting up the world during this transfer window for the first team, but the club is doing some excellent work with several of its top prospects — including recent USMNT U-20 squad call-up Grayson Dettoni.

arts.ttl: £70m Chelsea ace that Man United want agreeable to Bayern switch
arts.sum: Chelsea are set to be the big movers and shakers in the transfer window again, and Christopher Nkunku is agreeable to a move to Bayern Munich if the Bundesliga giants can agree to pay the £70m asking price. The Daily Mail note that Man United have already made what they call a shock loan enquiry, […] The post £70m Chelsea ace that Man United want agreeable to Bayern switch appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Champions League permuations as Liverpool, Arsenal, Man City and Aston Villa face decisive matches
arts.sum: The final fixtures of the group stage of the 2025 Champions League take place on Wednesday evening and with every side set to be in action throughout the evening, plenty could still happen

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Real Madrid wants Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich, but is it a fit?; Karim Adeyemi staying at Borussia Dortmund; Neymar headed home; Bayer Leverkusen eyeing Evan Ferguson; Angelo Stiller extends deal with VfB Stuttgart; and MORE!
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly “angry” with how Liverpool star, Trent Alexander-Arnold, has acted amid their growing interest, and they have sounded out the prospect of signing Bayern Munich ace, Joshua Kimmich, instead, as per Sky Sports Switzerland. Real Madrid has not been able to lock down a deal for Liverpool FC star Trent Alexander-Arnold, so it could turn to Bayern Munich ’s Joshua Kimmich to fill the void:

arts.ttl: Man Utd identify DREAM Chelsea target as Rashford replacement
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly identified Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel as a transfer target if Marcus Rashford or Alejandro Garnacho leave the club this month. The Red Devils are actively searching for a new forward amid reports that Rashford and Garnacho could both depart in January, and they have reportedly identified Tel as a possible option if either player leaves Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Slovan Bratislava: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Bayern Munich take on Slovan Bratislava in the Champions League on Wednesday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.
